title: Homeshopa Microwave Bacon Rack, Meat Heating Rack Plate, Bacon Grill Crisper Tray for Fat Drain Defrosting Meals Frozen Food, Kitchen Utensils Microwave Oven Baking Cooking Dish, Plastic
features: MICROWAVE BACON RACK: This Bacon Tray will have you in and out of the microwave in no time. Those golden strips of delicious bacon cook up tasty and crispy in minutes, which is ideal for satisfying your morning hunger when you're pressed for time. The bacon tray's durable plastic construction, which is free of BPA and Melamine, is microwave and oven safe up to 400°F. At any time of day, savour the flavour of quick and easy bacon cooked topped the secure Homeshopa Bacon Tray!

INNOVATION DESIGN: These white plastic bacon racks make perfectly cooked bacon in the microwave. Furthermore, the ridges keep grease away from the slices of meat, and the slanted design drains it away, ensuring that your bacon is crispy and delicious every time. This baking tray is a time-saving tool for any housewife.

RELIABLE AND SAFE TO USE: Our baking oven trays are made of quality plastic material, which is durable and reliable, has no strange odour and is safe to use, has a high temperature resistance and is not easily broken, has a large capacity and a rectangular shape that accommodates many slices of at the same time.

HEAT RESISTANT TRAY: This microwave bacon tray can withstand high temperatures without deformation, is safe to 400 degrees Fahrenheit, and can be used as a nice kitchen accessory for food preparation; simply adjust your cook time to achieve chewy to crispy results.

APPLICABLE OCCASIONS: These practical bacon rack is widely applicable in your life, good for frozen snacks such as bacon, pizza rolls, sandwiches, sausage, hot dogs, patties, steak, and more foods, allowing you to have a taste of these delicious foods easily and conveniently, suitable for home, office, restaurant, hotel, and other places.
description: Product description Have ealthier, less greasy bacon with Homeshopa Microwave Bacon Rack. In just one minute, the racks provide a quick and easy way to achieve healthier, crispier bacon! This durable bacon rack is a bacon lover's dream: the ridges keep grease away from the slices of meat, ensuring crispy, delicious bacon every time. If you are a fan of Bacon sandwiches, then this is ideal for you. The ribbed microwave Bacon rack allows fats and juices to drain away during cooking for healthier eating. Microwave safe BPA free bacon rack allow fat to drain away for healthier eating. It's not just for bacon! These racks are ideal for microwave defrosting as well as cooking other meats and vegetables. Providing kitchen tools and accessories to meet the needs of every cook. Feature In just minutes, you have a complete, mess-free breakfast. With many ridges in this baking tray for discharge grease easily. Ideal for bacon, sausage, and hot dogs baking, crispy and delicious. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, a great helper for every kitchen. Specification Dishwasher Microwave Safe Light & Easy To Use Microwave safe up to 120 Degrees SIZE & DIMENSION : L 25cm x W 20cm x H 1.5cm Legal Disclaimer Ensure items to be heated on the rack are defrosted throughout. Place the bacon evenly on rack. Depending on the power of microwave, 4 slices will take approximately 3 minutes to heat. Times will vary. Turn the bacon over half way through heating. Other items may also be heated on the bacon rack. For microwave ovens only. Avoid foods with high sugar content. Certain foods with high colouring content may cause slight staining. This will not affect performance. After using in microwave, always allow at least 30 seconds to cool down. Wash in hot soapy water. Always allow to cool before washing.
